title: Mizi's Enchanting!
description: (Currently Beta 0.3) Upcoming major update datapack with close to 60 new enchantments and a brand new vanilla enchantment ecosystem.
body:
This datapack contains a complete overhaul of the enchanting economy by changing most if not all vanilla enchantments to have extra effects, and even the addition of 58 brand new enchantments to the game. It also works to make enchanting as a whole more approachable and easier, including more ways to earn experience, enchantments, and many mehcnaics to help liven up your vanilla-plus playthroughs.

Officially still in development, but will be frequently updated as time goes on. This description will be tweaked with each test build as features / enchantments are added and/or tweaked.

Current build: Beta 0.3
- Has 20 fully implemented enchantments out of 58 so far.
- Changes many of the vanilla enchantments with new features or tweaks. See the changelog for further info.
- Changes many loot tables (block, entity, and some gameplay) to further support Fortune, Silk Touch, and especially Looting. Alongside many various new enchantments.
- Also adds a ton of miscellaneous features, with more planned in the future. Read the changelog to discover all the various extras, such as recipes, entity functions, and some chest loot table tweaks.
